title: How to get source code after parameter instantiation?
body:
I have a SystemVerilog module that instantiates submodules based on a parameter:
```systemverilog
module A #(parameter width = 3) ();  
  if (width >= 2) begin  
    B b();  
  end else begin  
    C c();  
  end  
endmodule  
```
During compilation, the parameter width is determined to be 3, so only submodule B is instantiated.

How can I obtain the simplified source code after parameter expansion, where only the relevant submodule remains?
